get.description: Retrieve all Goods Receipt Notes for the authenticated user

post.description:
Create a new Goods Receipt Note from mobile application.

This endpoint:
- Creates a GRN header with delivery details
- Creates GRN items for each received material
- Updates PO item received quantities
- Updates inventory (accepted quantity)
- Automatically updates PO status (Completed/Partial Received)

**Supports multipart/form-data for file uploads**
- Use multipart/form-data when uploading files
- Items array should be sent as JSON string when using form-data

Create a Direct GRN (without Purchase Order) from mobile application.

This endpoint:
- Creates a GRN with grn_type = direct (no PO required)
- Automatically sets received_qty = quantity, accepted_qty = quantity, rejected_qty = 0
- Creates GRN items for each material
- Calculates totals automatically

**Supports multipart/form-data for file uploads**
- Use multipart/form-data when uploading files
- Items array should be sent as JSON string when using form-data

workspace_id.description: Workspace ID (optional - auto-detected if not provided)

created_by.description: Created By User ID (optional - auto-detected if not provided)

items.description: JSON string of items array. Each item: {material_id, quantity, price, gst_master_id?, remarks?}

get.summary: Get data for creating a new GRN
get.description: Returns list of approved purchase orders that are not fully received
Get purchase order details including items with remaining quantities
Retrieve a specific Goods Receipt Note by ID

put.description: Update an existing Goods Receipt Note

delete.description: Delete a Goods Receipt Note and reverse inventory

get.summary: Get data for editing a GRN

post.description:
Legacy endpoint for creating GRN. Use POST /api/grn instead.
This endpoint creates a new Goods Receipt Note from mobile application.

**Supports multipart/form-data for file uploads**

get.description:
Retrieves GRN details for invoice creation preview.
Returns supplier, site, and items with accepted quantities.

**Note:** Returns 400 if invoice already exists for this GRN.

Requires 'purchase-invoice create' permission.

400.description: Invoice already exists for this GRN

example.message: Invoice already exists for this GRN

workspace_id.description: Workspace ID (optional - auto-detected if not provided)

created_by.description: User ID who created the GRN (optional - auto-detected if not provided)

items.description: Array of GRN items (send as JSON string for form-data)

workspace_id.description: Workspace ID (optional - auto-detected if not provided)

created_by.description: User ID who created the GRN (optional - auto-detected if not provided)

items.description: Array of GRN items (send as JSON string for form-data). received_qty, accepted_qty, and rejected_qty are auto-calculated from quantity.

quantity.description: Quantity received (automatically mapped to received_qty, accepted_qty; rejected_qty = 0)

bearerAuth.description: JWT token authentication. Get token from `/api/login` endpoint.
